rationale.R1.2: The artifact makes a chain of inferential moves — disagreement as novelty flag (63% figure), ensemble superiority, inductive-bias diversity as causal explanation — each of which could be checked for internal coherence under a 'take a look' reading.
rationale.R1.3: Several quantitative claims (macro-F1 0.81, 4–7 F1 point gaps, rare-class collapse to 0.3 vs. ensemble 0.55, 41,200/5,300 split) are in scope if the reviewer intends an evidence-claim audit.
